category_sources: current_curation.category_path is data; source_facts.description identifies creation, manipulation, and validation of bags
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bagit; official Library of Congress documentation uses the bagit package name
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Library of Congress bagit-python documentation site
repo_sources: Official Library of Congress documentation gives the GitHub clone URL for LibraryOfCongress/bagit-python
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies bag creation/manipulation/validation; official docs describe BagIt as a packaging format for digital preservation
